channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bandits attack Gwalgoro village in Katsina after failed raid, eleven civilians killed
item.description: For Katsina State, wahala no dey end as eleven people don lose their lives for Gwalgoro village in Kankia Local Government Area. The matter start after security forces block one operation wey notoriou...

item.title: Stocks Up, Oil Steady as Investors React to Middle East Proposals
item.description: Investors in Asia saw mixed results on Monday, with stocks making slight gains while oil prices remained stable. Brent crude futures rose by 0.2% to $108.36 per barrel, recovering from an earlier drop...

item.title: High-Net-Worth Canadians Prioritizing Life Satisfaction Over Wealth Accumulation
item.description: In Canada, a growing number of affluent individuals are shifting their financial priorities from accumulating wealth to achieving a sense of 'enough.' This trend involves clients reassessing what trul...

item.title: Kenyan Opposition Voices Concern Over President Ruto's Planned Visit to Tanzania
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement's Linda Mwananchi movement has expressed serious concerns over President William Ruto's planned visit to Tanzania and his scheduled address to the Tanzanian Parliament. ...

item.title: Colleen Gwynne Calls for Immediate Investigation into Kumanjayi Little Baby's Death
item.description: Former Northern Territory Children’s Commissioner Colleen Gwynne has urged immediate action and investigation into the death of Kumanjayi Little Baby. She emphasised the need to examine whether author...

item.title: Rising debt and declining local economies: the reality facing communities like Sheppey
item.description: The article uses the example of an empty car park in Queenborough on the Isle of Sheppey to illustrate the broader financial strain affecting communities across the UK. Previously free, the car park n...

item.title: Postpartum depression in Canada reveals gaps in care, workplace support, and awareness
item.description: Postpartum depression (PPD) affects up to one in five Canadian women, yet stigma, lack of awareness, and limited support systems often prevent many from seeking help. Psychiatrist Dr. Tuong Vi Nguyen,...

item.title: AFL star Nicky Winmar faces court over alleged assault
item.description: A woman has accused former AFL player Nicky Winmar of violently assaulting her at his home in Cohuna, northern Victoria, on May 14, 2025. The woman told Bendigo Magistrates' Court that Winmar suddenly...

item.title: Key Factors Driving BJP’s Performance in West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: The West Bengal Assembly Elections of 2026 witnessed a remarkable performance by the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) under the leadership of Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Analysts point towards five cruc...

item.title: The Inspiration Behind Bea Windorski's 'Elyucana' Gown at Miss Universe PH 2026
item.description: Bea Windorski, the Miss Universe Philippines 2026 representative from La Union, stunned everyone with her 'Elyucana' gown during the pageant. Designed by Filipino fashion designer Anthony Ramirez, the...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari shares his celebration plans
item.description: The article was intended to report on Suvendu Adhikari's response regarding his celebration plans, particularly whether he would celebrate with jhalmuri, a popular street snack, or with fish, which co...

item.title: Authorities Issue Wildfire Alert for North-Central Alberta Communities
item.description: Officials in north-central Alberta have issued a wildfire alert affecting several communities, including the Summer Village area. Residents are being urged to remain vigilant and prepare for potential...

item.title: WHO Reports Low Public Risk Following Suspected Hantavirus Cases on Cruise Ship
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has assured that the risk to the general public remains low following a suspected outbreak of hantavirus on a cruise ship in the Atlantic. The incident occurred on ...

item.title: Former Beauty Queens Support Bea Millan-Windorski's Miss Universe Philippines 2026 Victory
item.description: Bea Millan-Windorski, the recently crowned Miss Universe Philippines 2026, has received public support from well-known personalities in the pageant world, including CJ Opiaza and Gazini Ganados. Their...

item.title: Assessing the Sustainability of Electric Vehicles Amid Climate Challenges
item.description: Electric Vehicles (EVs) are increasingly promoted worldwide as a solution to reduce carbon emissions and combat climate change. However, the reality is more complicated than the clean image they proje...

item.title: P. C. George contests from Poonjar again in 2026 Kerala Assembly elections
item.description: P. C. George, a veteran Kerala politician and seven-time MLA from the Poonjar constituency, is contesting in the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections. Having served in the Kerala Legislative Assembly for ov...

item.title: Ben Mwonyonyo Gains Attention as Potential Running Mate for Nairobi Governor in 2027
item.description: As the 2027 Nairobi gubernatorial race approaches, Westlands constituency has become a key political battleground. Tim Wanyonyi, the incumbent MP, has been a significant player, with his personal assi...

item.title: West End residents raise concerns over new McDonald’s development
item.description: Construction of a new McDonald’s at 220 Melbourne Street, bordering West End, is set to begin next month, sparking concern among local residents. Brisbane City Council approved the fitout, which will ...

item.title: SAG-AFTRA and Studios Reach Preliminary Agreement to Prevent Strikes
item.description: SAG-AFTRA, the union representing actors and other entertainment professionals, has reached a tentative agreement with major studios in an attempt to avoid potential strikes. The deal, which was negot...

item.title: President Kagame Highlights Tanzania as Vital Trade Partner for Rwanda During Dar es Salaam Visit
item.description: Rwandan President Paul Kagame has visited Dar es Salaam and strongly reaffirmed the close and important partnership between Rwanda and Tanzania. He described Tanzania as a key strategic partner that s...
